blocks.content: The group got together two nights later. Eli's living room. Priya was there, which told Kit everything about how that had gone — Eli's face when he introduced her was the same face Kit had seen on exactly one other occasion, which was every time Eli talked about something he genuinely loved.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Before anyone says anything — yes, we're official, yes she knows about all of you, and yes I told her the DJ story from homecoming.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: All of it?

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: She needed context for who she was dealing with.

blocks.speaker: Priya
blocks.content: He has mentioned the DJ many times.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: Justified.

Savannah caught Daisy's eye across the room. Daisy was sitting close to Kit — close in the specific way that was new, that had a name now — and Savannah clocked it in under a second and her face did the thing it did when she was trying not to make a big deal about something she'd been waiting for.
She waited until they were in the kitchen.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: So.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: So.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: You're not going to make me ask.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Yes.
Savannah pressed her lips together. Breathed through her nose.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: Finally.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Don't.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: I've known since we were fourteen, Daisy.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I know.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: How does it feel.
Daisy looked through the kitchen doorway at Kit, who was currently losing an argument with Eli about something sports-related and absolutely knew she was watching him.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: Like it was always supposed to be this. And I just didn't have the nerve for a while.

blocks.speaker: Savannah
blocks.content: For the record — I had the nerve for you the whole time.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: I know you did.
